heading: Industrial mobilization: Board on Mobilization of Industries Essential for Military Preparedness
label: 4884 Industrial mobilization: Board on Mobilization of Industries Essential for Military Preparedness
text: The President may appoint a nonpartisan Board on Mobilization of Industries Essential for Military Preparedness, and may provide necessary clerical assistance, to organize and coordinate operations under sections 4882 and 4883 of this title.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 4502(d) and 9502(d) of this title, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 103–160, § 822(a)(2)

Amendments2021—, substituted “sections 4882 and 4883” for “sections 2538 and 2539”.Pub. L. 116–283, § 1870(e)(2)(B), renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 116–283, § 1870(e)(2)(A)section 2539a of this title1994— renumbered as section 2539a.Pub. L. 103–337section 2540 of this title
